glosses.en: to yell at; to tell off

translations.pt: Eu não estou gritando com você.
translations.hi: मैं तुम पर चिल्ला नहीं रहा हूँ.
translations.ja: あなたに怒鳴っていません。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the speaker as subject of the verb.
Proclitic negation particle forming the discontinuous negation ne … pas; placed before the verb.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present indicative) with attached direct-object clitic te → t' before a vowel; colloquial ‘to yell at/chew out’.
Negative adverb completing the ne … pas construction.

translations.vi: Ngừng quát tôi ngay bây giờ.
translations.nl: Hou nu op met tegen me schreeuwen.
translations.hu: Most hagyd abba, hogy rám kiabálsz.
translations.hi: अभी मुझ पर चिल्लाना बंद करो.
translations.nb: Slutt å rope til meg nå.
translations.ro: Încetează să țipi la mine acum.
translations.da: Stop med at råbe ad mig nu.
translations.ja: 今すぐ私に怒鳴るのをやめて。

tokens.explanation: Imperative, 2nd person singular; directive addressed to ‘tu’ (implicit subject).
Preposition introducing an infinitival complement (de + infinitif).
Infinitive verb with attached direct-object clitic me → m' before a vowel; complement of ‘arrête de’.
Temporal adverb specifying the time of the command.

sentences.target: Ils engueulent le serveur pour l'erreur.

translations.fr: Ils engueulent le serveur pour l'erreur.
translations.en: They're yelling at the waiter about the mistake.
translations.es: Están gritándole al camarero por el error.
translations.de: Sie schreien den Kellner wegen des Fehlers an.
translations.it: Stanno urlando contro il cameriere per l’errore.
translations.ko: 그들은 실수 때문에 웨이터에게 소리 지르고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们因为这个错误正在对服务员吼叫。
translations.yue: 佢哋因為個錯鬧緊侍應。
translations.ru: Они кричат на официанта из-за ошибки.
translations.pt: Eles estão gritando com o garçom por causa do erro.
translations.he: הם צועקים על המלצר בגלל הטעות.
translations.vi: Họ đang quát người phục vụ vì lỗi đó.
translations.ar: إنهم يصرخون على النادل بسبب الخطأ.
translations.nl: Ze schreeuwen tegen de ober vanwege de fout.
translations.uk: Вони кричать на офіціанта через помилку.
translations.hi: वे गलती के कारण वेटर पर चिल्ला रहे हैं.
translations.el: Φωνάζουν στον σερβιτόρο για το λάθος.
translations.nb: De kjefter på kelneren på grunn av feilen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang berteriak pada pelayan karena kesalahan itu.
translations.sv: De skriker åt servitören på grund av felet.
translations.ro: Ei țipă la chelner din cauza greșelii.
translations.cs: Křičí na číšníka kvůli té chybě.
translations.da: De råber ad tjeneren på grund af fejlen.
translations.ja: 彼らはその間違いのことでウェイターに怒鳴っている。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun, 3rd person plural (masculine or mixed group).
Finite verb (3rd person plural, present indicative); colloquial ‘to yell at/chew out’.
Definite article, masculine singular; introduces the direct object noun.
Common noun; direct object of ‘engueulent’.
Preposition introducing a PP expressing cause/reason.
Noun with elided definite article l' before a vowel (le/la → l'); object of ‘pour’. Surface keeps the clitic; head lemma is the noun.

sentences.target: On n'aime pas engueuler les enfants.

translations.fr: On n'aime pas engueuler les enfants.
translations.en: We don't like yelling at children.
translations.es: No nos gusta gritarles a los niños.
translations.de: Wir mögen es nicht, Kinder anzuschreien.
translations.it: Non ci piace urlare contro i bambini.
translations.ko: 우리는 아이들에게 소리 지르는 것을 좋아하지 않는다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们不喜欢对孩子吼叫。
translations.ru: Нам не нравится кричать на детей.
translations.pt: Não gostamos de gritar com crianças.
translations.he: אנחנו לא אוהבים לצעוק על ילדים.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi không thích quát mắng trẻ em.
translations.ar: نحن لا نحب الصراخ على الأطفال.
translations.nl: We houden er niet van om tegen kinderen te schreeuwen.
translations.uk: Нам не подобається кричати на дітей.
translations.hi: हमें बच्चों पर चिल्लाना पसंद नहीं है.
translations.el: Δεν μας αρέσει να φωνάζουμε στα παιδιά.
translations.nb: Vi liker ikke å kjefte på barn.
translations.id: Kami tidak suka berteriak pada anak-anak.
translations.sv: Vi gillar inte att skrika åt barn.
translations.ro: Nu ne place să țipăm la copii.
translations.da: Vi kan ikke lide να råbe ad børn.
translations.fi: Emme pidä siitä, että huudamme lapsille.
translations.ja: 私たちは子どもに怒鳴るのが好きではありません。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/personal); takes 3rd person singular verb agreement, often used for ‘we’.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present) with attached negative clitic ne → n'; part of ne … pas negation.
Negative adverb completing the ne … pas construction.
Infinitive verb functioning as the complement of ‘aimer’ (here, the action that is disliked).
Definite article, plural; introduces the noun ‘enfants’ as the object of the infinitive.
Common noun, plural; direct object of the infinitive ‘engueuler’.
